title: tellima grandiflora
intro: Tellima grandiflora, also known as fringecup, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Scrophulariaceae. Its flowers and leaves have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with reported medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Tellima grandiflora is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in salves and ointments for topical applications.
